component.name: Dinosaur Planet: Recompiled
component.summary: Static recompilation of Dinosaur Planet for PC.

description.p:
Dinosaur Planet: Recompiled is a project that uses N64: Recompiled to statically recompile Dinosaur Planet into a native port with many new features and enhancements. This project uses RT64 as the rendering engine to provide some of these enhancements.
The original game is required to run this project.
https://github.com/Francessco121/dino-recomp
